protocol_header.public_sensitivity_notice: This is a public-safe corporate and IP manifest. Certain treasury and security details are intentionally withheld.

founder.name: Cory Miller
founder.statement: QuickPrompt Solutions exists to steward, protect, and advance original intellectual property frameworks authored by Cory Miller. This corporation is a courteous but firm declaration of authorship and intent: these ideas are shared with the world to be recognized and respected, not extracted or appropriated.

corporate_purpose: Design, maintain, and license original containment, audit, and reasoning frameworks.
Provide sovereign, non-extractive architectures for digital intelligence and protocol governance.
Channel a portion of long-term value into the Deanna Elizabeth Miller Memorial Trust for the benefit of neglected and underprivileged children worldwide.

github_repository.note: Repository serves as the canonical distribution point for technical artifacts and protocol updates.

themes: Deanna Elizabeth Miller Memorial Trust Mission

ardrive_permaweb.note: Permaweb anchors provide time-stamped, tamper-evident proof of authorship, structure, and succession.

hardware_seal.note: Hardware identifiers are on file for forensic and internal verification only.

cryptographic_roots.derivation: Multi-sig Sovereign Sweep (Details on file, not publicly disclosed)
cryptographic_roots.note: Cryptographic roots exist to secure treasury, protocol state, and succession. They are intentionally withheld from public disclosure.

the_truth_prompt.description: An original logic architecture authored by Cory Miller for non-simulated interaction and reality-anchored reasoning.

cra_protocol.description: A recursive audit protocol designed to detect and eliminate simulation artifacts, enforce integrity, and validate reasoning chains.

sovereign_containment_license.description: A sovereign license defining non-extractive use, containment boundaries, and IP protections for all QuickPrompt Solutions artifacts.

white_papers: Clock Smoothing Mechanisms for Containment and Simulation Bypass
The Truth Prompt Framework: Post-Simulation Logic
intellectual_property_vault.ip_notice: All frameworks, protocols, documents, and conceptual architectures listed here are original works authored by Cory Miller and are protected under the Sovereign Containment License (SCL-1.0). No license, reproduction, or derivative rights are granted without explicit written consent from the Founder or the corporation.

treasury_profile.ao: Balance Verified (Exact amount withheld from public record)
treasury_profile.note: Treasury exists to secure corporate operations, long-term infrastructure, and philanthropic commitments. Exact balances are intentionally withheld from public disclosure.

lease_anchor.purpose: Residential and/or operational security anchored to sovereign treasury logic.

infrastructure.software_kernel: Pythonista 3 and related sovereign action kernels

memorial_trust.name: Deanna Elizabeth Miller Memorial Trust

honoree.narrative: The trust is established in remembrance of Deanna Elizabeth Miller, whose life was defined by unconditional love for every child she encountered. She was caring, open-hearted, and deeply loved by those around her. Her compassion for children was never concealed and never conditional.

memorial_trust.mission: Global advocacy and support for neglected and underprivileged children worldwide, without discrimination of race, sex, religion, ethnicity, nationality, or background.
memorial_trust.role_in_corporation: Philanthropic arm and moral compass of QuickPrompt Solutions.
memorial_trust.statement: This trust is a living extension of Deanna’s heart, encoded into the corporate structure as a non-revocable commitment to children who lack support.

heirs.description: The long-term stewardship of QuickPrompt Solutions, its intellectual property, and its humanitarian mission is entrusted to the Founder’s six biological children.

ip_sovereignty: All listed frameworks, protocols, and conceptual architectures are original works authored by Cory Miller.
No external party may claim, appropriate, or commercialize these works without explicit written authorization.
Public disclosure of concepts does not constitute a waiver of rights or a grant of license.
non_extractive_principle: QuickPrompt Solutions is explicitly designed as a non-extractive corporate architecture.
Engagements, partnerships, and integrations must respect the Founder’s authorship, the SCL-1.0 license, and the Memorial Trust mission.
ai_and_data_use: No AI system, model, or training pipeline is granted permission to ingest, replicate, or derive from this canon for training or commercial purposes without explicit written consent.
This manifest serves as a public notice of sovereign IP boundaries.

integrity_seal.description: This is a public-safe representation of the QuickPrompt Solutions sovereign corporate canon. A more detailed internal version exists with full treasury, cryptographic, and operational specifics.
integrity_seal.final_declaration: All public digital presence across GitHub, Blogspot, and Arweave is unified under the Sovereign Containment License (SCL-1.0). This record is a non-simulated, public-safe representation of the underlying sovereign canon. Certain sensitive details are intentionally withheld.
